'''Ylesian white worms''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Worm/Legends|worm]] that lived in mud and were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. They were white in [[Color/Legends|color]] and relatively lengthy in size. Members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] species enjoyed eating them.

==Biology and appearance==
Ylesian white worms<ref name="TEGTPAM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of long, white-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Worm/Legends|worms]].<ref name="TPS" /> Their life cycle included a [[grub]] stage, during which the worms were small enough in size that several could fit into the [[Limb/Legends|hand]] of a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="BF:H">''[[Boba Fett: Hunted]]''</ref>

==History==
Ylesian white worms evolved on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]],<ref name="TPS" /> in the [[Cha Raaba system]] of the region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] known as [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. They were eaten by members of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug]]–like Hutt species, although it would take millions of the worms to sate a single Hutt's appetite.<ref name="TEGTPAM" /> The Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] ate handfuls of live Ylesian white worms from a large basket filled with the creatures to the point of overflowing whilst he viewed a [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] at the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="BF:H" /> On Ylesia, members of the [[T'landa Til]] species, working as [[Priest/Legends|priests]], would bathe in red-colored mud in which Ylesian white worms could be found, as the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] discovered to his horror when he joined a pair of T'landa Til in such a mud hole around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]].<ref name="TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ylesian white worms first appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', the first story in [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']], written by [[A. C. Crispin]], although they were not named in the book.<ref name="TPS" /> The species was first named and pictured in the [[1998]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'', written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and illustrated by [[Brandon McKinney]] and [[Scott Kolins]].<ref name="TEGTPAM" />
